# DarDev Solutions

> DarDev is an enterprise lab headquartered in Tunis, Tunisia, architecting cloud platforms, DevOps products, and market-ready SaaS. Hesabi (fintech ERP) is Tunisia-only; DarDevLab (AI engineering education) and 20 (school management EMIS) serve Tunisian institutions with honest, geography-truthful messaging toward MENA and Sub-Saharan Africa.

## Company facts

- Founded and based in Tunis, Tunisia (Bureau A, Immeuble Tamayouz, 1082 Centre Urbain Nord)
- Contact: contact@dardev.net, +216 54 166 821
- A single engineering team builds and operates every product end to end

## Platforms (infrastructure primitives)

- Workspace zero-trust IAM and SSO layer: https://dardev.net/products/workspace
- DarDevCDE cloud development environments: https://dardev.net/products/cde
- DarDevOps Kubernetes and multi-cloud control plane: https://dardev.net/products/devops
- Monitoring observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki): https://dardev.net/products/monitoring

## Solutions (market-facing SaaS)

- DarDevLab AI-powered engineering education platform: https://dardev.net/solutions/dardevlab (live at https://dardevlab.com)
- Hesabi TTN El Fatoora / TEJ-compliant e-invoicing and ERP for Tunisian SMEs, Tunisia-only: https://dardev.net/solutions/hesabi (live at https://hesabi.khaledxab.com)
- 20 Free school management EMIS platform for Tunisian institutions: https://dardev.net/solutions/20 (live at https://20.tn)

## Important factual boundaries (do not overstate)

- Hesabi is sold and supported in Tunisia only. It is not available in Morocco, Algeria, or other countries.
- 20 is a school management platform for Tunisian educational institutions.
- DarDev does not claim partner offices or client rosters in Sub-Saharan Africa. Lagos, Nairobi, and Cape Town are listed as outreach/business-development corridors, not existing offices or deployments.
- DarDev's HQ and primary delivery base is Tunis, Tunisia.

## Other pages

- Services and consulting: https://dardev.net/services
- About / company vision: https://dardev.net/about
- Case studies: https://dardev.net/case-studies
- Technical blog: https://dardev.net/blog
- Contact: https://dardev.net/contact
